title: How do I create graphs that display progression over time
excerpt: I want to create a line graph that automatically shows the progression over time based on the completion percentage of the Key Results (KR) on my OKR board. The graph should extend each week as the KR completion perce…

posts.author: Ben.felt (Benjamin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Monday ohoto1471×797 58.3 KB

I want to create a line graph that automatically shows the progression over time based on the completion percentage of the Key Results (KR) on my OKR board. The graph should extend each week as the KR completion percentage is updated, reflecting the progress over time.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Ben!

Is this chart along the lines of what you’re hoping to set up?

Screen Shot 2023-06-22 at 12.50.06 pm2700×1258 179 KB

I think there are a few of ways you could achieve this, but I’d like to understand if this is particular structure aligns with your end goal?
